bird.name: Campo flicker
bird.summary: The campo flicker (Colaptes campestris) is a species of bird in subfamily Picinae of the woodpecker family Picidae. It is found in Argentin…

relations.subject: Campo flicker
relations.evidence: No immediate threats to either have been identified. The species is "considered common throughout its range." "Although Campo Flicker populations may benefit by the increasing amount of open habitats due to human interventions, alternatively, the species may suffer from the decrease of available nesting sites due to deforestation."
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
